generated.findings: The lungs are clear. Heart size is normal. No pneumothorax, pleural effusion or airspace consolidation. Cardiac and mediastinal contours are within normal limits.
generated.impression: No acute cardiopulmonary abnormality. No evidence of active disease.

ground_truth.findings: Examination was performed with nipple markers. The previously noted small nodule in the right lower lung is not well-seen on today's study and may have been secondary to summation of structures. The heart is normal in size. The mediastinum is unremarkable. The lungs are otherwise clear.
ground_truth.impression: No acute disease. Previously visualized nodule in right lower lobe not well-seen on today's study, [REDACTED] summation artifact.
